summary: Verified localStorage save-schema compatibility for US-841. Coverage now includes stable schema-1 active bullet envelopes, legacy shipped schema-one state migration, corrupt JSON fallback, unsupported schema fallback, unsupported bullet-size settings, missing active envelope fields, score-table mismatches, finished/completed non-resumable saves, and app-level fallback for bad saved data.

tests_run.details: 9 test files passed, 74 tests passed, production build passed

evidence_matrix.scenario: Versioned schema-1 active bullet envelope stores and restores activeBulletSettings, currentDeal, scoreTable, and technicalDealHistory.
Legacy shipped { schema: 1, state } envelope migrates into the active bullet shape with default bullet size 10.
evidence_matrix.limitations: No older multi-version migrations required by task.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Corrupt JSON, unsupported schema, malformed legacy state, unsupported active bullet settings, missing active envelope fields, score mismatches, finished saves, and completed bullet targets do not load as resumable games.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts && npm run test -- src/test/startResume.integration.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: LocalStorage schema fixture and jsdom app fallback verification.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: Sartre review plus targeted schema tests
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Local-only persistence; no backend migration layer exists.

reviews.summary: No blockers; compatibility surface and added coverage accepted.
